CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-02-2009 AT 10:30AM. FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT WITHIN THREE YEARS OF THE FILING ON THE COMPLAINT, PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 583.210 AND C.C.P. 583.250. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules, failure to comply with CCP 583.210 and CCP 583.250. Failure to file Proof of Service of Summons and Complaint within five years. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee, CSR# 2647. (212)
